Package neqsim.process.equipment.separator.entrainment

Class SeparatorInternalsDatabase.InternalsRecord

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.equipment.separator.entrainment.SeparatorInternalsDatabase.InternalsRecord
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Enclosing class:
SeparatorInternalsDatabase
public static class SeparatorInternalsDatabase.InternalsRecord extends Object implements Serializable
Data record for a separator internals specification.
